final_prompt.prompt:
Create a technical step-by-step instructional diagram illustrating how to deploy Hermes inside a Docker container and integrate it with GLMCodingPlan.

Style/medium: needs a clean technical documentation / infographic aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be vertical layout with clearly numbered steps 1 → 2 → 3 → 4 in sequential top-to-bottom flow, each step visually separated
Subject: must include all 4 deployment steps:
  Step 1: Docker environment setup / pulling the Hermes image
  Step 2: Running / configuring the Hermes container
  Step 3: Connecting / integrating GLMCodingPlan into the container
  Step 4: Verification / successful deployment confirmation
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a developer-tool / dark-mode or light technical palette — exact color scheme is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include step labels "1" "2" "3" "4", "Hermes", "Docker", "GLMCodingPlan"
Constraints: must preserve clear visual hierarchy between steps; each step must contain a small illustrative icon or diagram snippet showing the action; step numbers must be prominently labeled
Avoid: must avoid decorative non-technical illustration styles; must avoid ambiguous or unlabeled steps
